item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-20 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] gvergnaud/ts-pattern (+3 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: 🎨 The exhaustive Pattern Matching library for TypeScript, with smart type inference. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +3，前 3 日均值 0.3，加速度 9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+1720 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1720，前 3 日均值 212，加速度 8.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] KnockOutEZ/wigolo (+862 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +862，总 stars 2,088，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+876 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +876，前 3 日均值 230.3，加速度 3.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+658 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +658，前 3 日均值 320，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] headroomlabs-ai/headroom (+626 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 20% fewer tokens for coding agents, 60-95% fewer tokens for JSON, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +626，前 3 日均值 160，加速度 3.9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] trycua/cua (+2165 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Browser / Computer Use Description: Scale computer-use 2.0 with open-source drivers, cross-OS fleets, and benchmarks for training, evaluation, and data generation. Why it matters: AI Browser / Computer Use 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2165，总 stars 20,300，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+454 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +454，总 stars 40,268，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] DietrichGebert/ponytail (+673 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
